untranslatable_reason: Signal requires microstructure-level logic (competitor bid matching patterns, order book depth, time precedence, tick-by-tick sequencing, and sub-second execution timing) that cannot be expressed with OHLCV and technical indicators alone. Entry condition 'Competitor has shown any pattern of bidding (2+ historical matches)' requires order flow data and counterparty tracking. Entry condition 'You are willing to execute at any level offered' is a policy/intent statement. Exit condition 'Competitor does not take offer within 1 second' requires real-time order book monitoring and latency measurement. This is a high-frequency market microstructure strategy, not a price-action or technical analysis signal.
translation_notes: Attempted to map high urgency + high volatility + spread awareness to volume and ATR proxies, but the core logic—skipping price levels to gain time precedence over competitors—is fundamentally order-flow dependent and cannot be reliably backtested on OHLCV data. Requires order book, trade sequence, and latency infrastructure.
